title: SaaS subscription gate on login; owner perms after purchase
description:
New pipeshare.net accounts no longer receive PipeShare/PipeSync tool permissions at sign-up. Workspace-owner roles, portal scopes, and tenant Wasabi seeds apply only after Stripe reports an active or trialing subscription on login.

Every business login syncs subscription status from Stripe (when a customer id exists), refreshes Postgres, then applies or revokes owner privileges. Purchasers without a subscription show subscription expired and Account holder in cPanel until they subscribe and sign in again.

Who is affected: all SaaS cPanel sign-ups and returning purchasers on pipeshare.net.
changeLog: Sign-up creates tenant draft only — no owner tool permissions until subscribed.
Login syncs Stripe subscription status every time for tenant purchasers.
Active/trialing subscription required before workspace-owner roles apply.
Expired/canceled subscription revokes owner roles on login.
New tenants default to subscription expired; cPanel shows Account holder pre-subscribe.
